Get Started
Claude Business Setup

Get Claude set up
the right way.

Most businesses sign up for Claude and never get past the chat window. We do the full setup — Projects, system prompts, knowledge base, team training.

Get Set Up Properly → Implementation Details
Where most teams get stuck

You signed up for Claude.
Now what?

🔑
Account set up, nobody using it
The subscription is paid. It's open in someone's browser. It hasn't changed anything.
📁
No Projects configured
Claude Projects are the highest-leverage feature in the product. Most businesses have never opened them.
⚙️
No system prompts
Without system prompts, Claude doesn't know your business, your voice, or your standards.
👥
Team not on board
One person is using it occasionally. The rest are waiting for someone to show them what to do.
What we set up

Complete Claude configuration
for your business.

We don't hand you documentation. We build it out and train your team on it.

01
Account & Workspace Audit
Review your current Claude setup, team access, and subscription tier. Make sure you're on the right plan for your usage.
02
Claude Projects Build-Out
We create Projects for each major use case — each with its own context, knowledge base, and system prompt.
03
System Prompt Writing
Custom system prompts that encode your brand voice, business context, and quality standards into every conversation.
04
Knowledge Base Loading
Your brand docs, style guides, product info, and SOPs uploaded where Claude can reference them automatically.
05
Workflow Documentation
Simple playbooks for each workflow so your team can execute them without coming back to us every time.
06
Team Onboarding
Live training with your full team — everyone leaves knowing what to use Claude for and how to do it.
